name: memorydetective-plugin
description: iOS leak hunting and performance investigation. Bundles the memorydetective MCP server with a /perf-investigate skill. One-command install for Claude Code.

plugins.name: memorydetective
plugins.description: iOS leak hunting + performance investigation: 34 MCP tools, 36-pattern cycle classifier with Swift fixTemplate snippets, analyzeAbandonedMemory for the leakCount=0 family (orphaned KVO observers, runaway caches, singleton-retained payloads), detectLeaksInXCTest per-test CI gate with self-contained HTML reports, cleanupTraces ops tool, mainThreadViolations classification on analyzeHangs (sync-io / db-lock / network / lock-contention), single-call build+boot+launch fixing the macOS 26.x leaks --outputGraph regression, replayScenario + captureScenarioState verify-fix loop, compareTracesByPattern for CI gating, /perf-investigate skill. Reads .memgraph + .trace files; classifies retain cycles; bridges to Swift source via SourceKit-LSP.
